creator: dpetrov67@gmail.com
text:
Looks like 2.4.0 is fine, 2.4.1 is not.

Also, the 2.4.1 tar.gz file size at https://github.com/rthalley/dnspython/archive/refs/tags/v2.4.1.tar.gz is 357296 bytes, but the one in distinfo is 327929.

It is possible that the archive was since repacked/fixed, and this explains the issue.

In any case, there is also a just released version 2.4.2.
